title: Mima’s Fading Hum
cover_prompt: A soft, round creature with velvety fur and half-closed eyes, curled in a nest of woven starlight, floating in a quiet indigo sky. The edges blur into mist, and the only light comes from a distant, dim glow, as if the world itself is breathing.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmmm ooh mmmm
Hmm aah hmm
Mmm ooh ooh mmm

[verse]
Mmmm aah mmm
Ooh hmm ooh
Mmmm

[verse]
Mmm ooh
Hmm

---
style_prompt: Solo female vocal lullaby, humming only, no instruments, no melody variation, sustained warm tones, 58 BPM, extremely intimate, breathy, mouth-closed humming, monotone drone, like breathing set to pitch, meditative, hypnotic, no percussion, pure voice

character.name: Mima
character.identity: A gentle, shapeless guardian who hums the world to rest with the sound of a slowing heartbeat.
character.special: Their voice carries the weight of every quiet moment before sleep, fading like the last breath of the day.

about: A lullaby of pure humming, designed to slow the breath and steady the heart. The drone-like rhythm mimics a mother’s heartbeat, guiding little ones into deep, peaceful sleep. Its sadness is soft, like a sigh, making space for even the heaviest eyes to close.
